title: draba lindenii var. funckii
intro: Draba lindenii var. funckii, also known as Rockcress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Rockcress include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and improving respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
